creator: samy.mahmoudi@gmail.com
text:
x11/xlogo: Update to 1.0.5

Update x11/xlogo to 1.0.5
Add license file
Add missing dependencies

This release fixes a bug in which you had to hit "q" then "Escape" to exit,
and collects several years worth of janitorial maintenance.

Changelog:
https://lists.x.org/archives/xorg/2019-March/059637.html
